title: viola × cooperrideri
intro: Viola × cooperrideri, also known as the Cooperrider's violet or hybrid violet, is a rare and endangered hybrid plant species of the genus Viola, resulting from the cross between Viola sororia and Viola pubescens. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Viola × cooperrideri include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate stress, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Viola × cooperrideri can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
